summary: Intent-review spec_fidelity=pass after draft→approvedInputs fix. All 7 ACs mapped to tests. Domain checks clean for mock demo (no network, React-controlled inputs, localStorage persistence with try/catch). Non-blocking smells remain as INFO only.

criticalFindings.description: Intent-review smell (non-blocking): CREATE_HERO_PRODUCT_WORKFLOW_KEY still duplicated across modules.
Intent-review smell (non-blocking): executionProgress unused by UI.

interfaceChanges.description: Mock approval→In Progress lifecycle; drafts flow into approvedInputs.

mappings.criterion: Approve opens a prefilled, editable five-stage review without executing on first click
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/recommendation-review.test.tsx::does not call startExecution on mount or before Approve is clicked

mappings.criterion: Analytics evidence deep-links to the canonical Analytics metric route rather than duplicating reporting
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/recommendation-review.test.tsx::exposes a navigable analytics deep link on the Analytics stage

mappings.criterion: Final mock approval records the documented workflow/tool key and opens an In Progress execution
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/recommendation-review.test.tsx::calls startExecution and routes to In Progress only on Approve click

mappings.criterion: Shared In Progress list/detail supports needs_input, executing, and completed without creating a route per step
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/in-progress.test.tsx::supports shared In Progress list/detail for needs_input, executing, and completed without a route per step

mappings.criterion: Workflow 1 action, wait, outcome, recovery, and rollback states match its design specification
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/in-progress.test.tsx::renders Workflow 1 action, wait, outcome, recovery, and rollback states on the 14-step timeline

mappings.criterion: Manual Refresh restores Workflow 1 as the Priority Card and clears its execution state
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/demo-state-execution.test.tsx::clears execution records and review drafts on Manual Refresh reset

mappings.criterion: No backend request or real write occurs
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/decisions-recommendations.test.tsx::makes no backend request or real write anywhere in the recommendations flow

recommendations: Optional follow-up: single-source CREATE_HERO_PRODUCT_WORKFLOW_KEY and drop unused executionProgress.

findings.description: Intent-review smell (non-blocking): CREATE_HERO_PRODUCT_WORKFLOW_KEY still duplicated across modules.
Intent-review smell (non-blocking): executionProgress unused by UI.
